data.name: Hentai Dynasty
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Dynasty is a relaxing and casual swap-based puzzle game where your goal is to restore scrambled images by placing each tile into its correct position.

Designed for players who enjoy calm and satisfying gameplay, Hentai Dynasty offers a straightforward puzzle experience focused on observation, logic, and relaxation. Each level features a complete image that has been divided into square blocks and randomly shuffled across the screen. By swapping tiles, you slowly reconstruct the image piece by piece.

Simple Puzzle Mechanics

The gameplay is easy to understand and accessible to everyone. You simply select two blocks and swap their positions to move closer to the correct image layout. There are no complicated mechanics, no time limits, and no pressure — just smooth and intuitive tile-swapping puzzles that let you play at your own pace.

Relaxing and Stress-Free Gameplay

Hentai Dynasty is built around relaxation. The calm progression and gentle difficulty curve make it perfect for unwinding after a long day. As you advance, puzzles become slightly more engaging, encouraging better focus and visual awareness without ever feeling overwhelming.

Helpful Hints When You Need Them

If you find yourself stuck on a puzzle, optional hints are always available. These hints gently guide you toward the correct swaps without solving the puzzle for you, keeping the experience immersive and frustration-free.

A Cozy Casual Puzzle Experience

Whether you enjoy image puzzles, tile swap games, or casual puzzle games designed for relaxation, Hentai Dynasty delivers a comfortable and satisfying experience. Progress through levels at your own rhythm and enjoy the simple pleasure of completing each image one swap at a time.

data.short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Dynasty, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
